path= nests commands under bare intermediate nodes, name= overrides the
derived leaf token, the same leaf name may recur under different parents,
and an executable command can parent deeper paths.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

// Show application status.
//
//fabrik:cli:command
func Status(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

// Inspect the database.
//
//fabrik:cli:command name=database
func DB(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

// Apply pending migrations.
//
//fabrik:cli:command path="database migrate"
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

// Show database status.
//
//fabrik:cli:command path="database status"
func DBStatus(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

// List queued jobs.
//
//fabrik:cli:command path="jobs list"
func JobsList(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "status",
				Help: "Show application status",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					return shared.Status(ctx)
				},
			},
			{
				Name: "database",
				Help: "Inspect the database",
				Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
					{
						Name: "migrate",
						Help: "Apply pending migrations",
						Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
							return shared.Migrate(ctx)
						},
					},
					{
						Name: "status",
						Help: "Show database status",
						Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
							return shared.DBStatus(ctx)
						},
					},
				},
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					return shared.DB(ctx)
				},
			},
			{
				Name: "jobs",
				Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
					{
						Name: "list",
						Help: "List queued jobs",
						Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
							return shared.JobsList(ctx)
						},
					},
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
